blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: God does not lie. No, God is a being who cannot lie.
An omnipotent God cannot lie because any word can be made into reality.
But Shirone saw it in the woman's eyes. She was hiding something.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You said there was no way back when I asked. But that wasn't true.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: Whether there's a way back or not, since I said there isn't, there isn't. That's the reason.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's a lie.
The woman flinched.
Shirone didn't miss her reaction.
As she panicked, the scenery of the temple rippled as if submerged in water.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you really a God?
He had doubted it from the beginning.
Of course, there was no reason why the form of God imagined by humans had to be the real God, but even so, the woman's reactions were too human-like.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: Shirone. We have different concepts of God. That's why there's been a misunderstanding. God is not as sublime as you think. Just a designer of the world.
As the woman extended her hand, a glass orb floated above her palm.
Inside the orb was a small village landscape with scattered people standing around.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: As you can see, I created this village. Of course, it's just a model. But I can also move people like this.
The woman inserted her finger into the orb and moved a farmer feeding his horse to a nearby field.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: See, the farmer has moved. Changing space means granting time. Can you find any difference from the world you lived in? No. This is what God is. I've become the God of this village now.
The woman pushed the orb closer to Shirone's face.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: God is ultimately nothing more than a designer who can create a dimension one level lower than the one they inhabit. Yet why does God feel like an absolute being? That's the interesting part. This farmer won't even realize that some force moved him to the nearby field.
The woman pulled the orb back and cradled it in both hands.
As she spread her arms wide, the village instantly expanded, covering the temple.
Shirone looked around. He had somehow entered the village.
The two stood at opposite ends of a path, facing each other. The other people remained motionless.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: This farmer doesn't know how imperfect the world I created is. Because he was born here. There's only one way to find out.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Immortal Function.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: Correct. The Immortal Function expands the senses to the whole. This village is contained within the glass orb. So it's no exaggeration to say there's no world beyond the orb.
The woman placed her hand on the farmer's shoulder.
The farmer turned into light, spreading across the sky.
As the woman clenched her fist, the scenery shrank, and the entire village returned to the orb.
Shirone silently stared at the orb.
It was filled with light from the farmer.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: This farmer expanded into the whole through the Immortal Function. But even then, he can't perceive my existence. The same goes for you, Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone felt the farmer's state wasn't someone else's problem. If the woman hadn't attempted hijacking, he too would have dissipated into meaningless light.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What do you want from me? Knowing these facts, what can I possibly do?

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: This is it, Shirone.
The woman placed the orb between her palms and pressed.
The orb shrank, compressing into a black dot.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Spot…….

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: Yes. This is the true nature of the world we live in. The world you inhabit is ultimately just a dot. But inside, endless worlds unfold. The spacetime matrix.
The woman demonstrated.
The scenery in the orb disappeared into the dot, and a new world was born.
Worlds within worlds, and again within worlds…….
Then, as she clasped her hands together, the orb vanished.
Billions of worlds disappeared in an instant.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: Please enter the spacetime I created. There, create your own spacetime. That's how a perfect universe is born.
For some reason, she seemed to desire innovation in her world.
It wasn't an unpleasant proposal.
Becoming a God of another world in exchange for death seemed like a decent ending.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can't do that.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: Why? You have no reason or justification to refuse.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If I enter your spacetime, another person like me will have to be sacrificed.
A flicker of sadness passed through the woman's eyes.
But the change in emotion was brief, and she soon returned to a cold expression.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: What does that matter? It's your created world anyway.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But you're not a God.
For the first time, hostility appeared in the woman's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You're a human like me, inhabiting the same world. The proof is that you brought me here before I was completely disassembled. If you were truly a God, shouldn't you exist outside the world?
The woman didn't deny it.
But that didn't change the outcome.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: Shirone, you must follow my words. I called you here for a purpose. If you refuse, I can put you through the disassembly process even now.
His mind was reconstructed by the woman's power.
So perhaps she could freely revert it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But now that there was even the slightest chance of returning to his original world, Shirone had no intention of obeying.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I won't be disassembled.
The woman extended her hand to Shirone and invoked the omnipotence of disassembly.
But Shirone didn't disassemble.
He had already entered the Spirit Zone.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: You've solved another problem. An excellent choice.
The woman's arm slowly lowered.
Now I understand.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: The Spirit Zone was also a spot.
A spot could be infinitely delved into by the principles of the spacetime matrix.
That was why Shirone, as a spiritual entity, could enter the Spirit Zone again.

blocks.speaker: God
blocks.content: And this place…… is your Spirit Zone.
Shirone concentrated the energy of light.
The woman frowned uncomfortably.
The red glow emanating from Shirone's body pressed against her with a menacing aura.
